chapter_mapping: 第七大章 = 高考能力专题 = G-01..G-12
method: Playwright Chromium browser-level clicks, keyboard operations, select changes, step controls, record/reset controls, and 390x844 viewport inspection; static source assertions are listed separately in the chief-editor report.

G-01.action: pause; select I-U; move intercept control to 5.0
G-01.finding: The formula card states y/x while the same non-origin line correctly computes delta-y/delta-x; the two student-visible rules contradict each other.

G-03.action: pause; select meter; operate the same zero-error/multiplier control with Home and End while keeping the pointer fixed
G-03.home_readout: 原读数 27.50 A; 修正/换算后 0.330 A
G-03.end_readout: 原读数 27.50 V; 修正/换算后 8.250 V
G-03.finding: A control labelled zero error/multiplier silently changes instrument type and range from 0.6 A to 15 V.

G-08.action: press step 24 times to t=6.00 s in spring compression
G-08.finding: The drawn compression is proportional to Ep, but Ep is proportional to x squared; at half energy the page draws half compression instead of sqrt(1/2) compression.

G-09.action: press single-step once from the default state
G-09.finding: The displayed emf is four times the slope of the page's own flux record for the same step.

G-10.action: at 390x844, operate speed, charge, play, record, and reset controls
G-10.physics_tolerance_review: pending revision because abs(relative deviation) < 4% is called straight-through without a stated measurement-resolution model

G-11.action: select drone drop; pause; move wind-speed control from 0 to 5 m/s
G-11.finding: Wind changes the projectile while the model simultaneously declares air resistance ignored.

G-12.action: move orbit height to 2000 km and orbital speed to 1.0 km/s
G-12.finding: The open exploration continues to label an independently chosen, non-viable speed-height pair as an orbit instead of distinguishing kinematic circumference/time from a gravitational circular orbit.
